commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper verdict: pass (sha=d193cae1f89a5ac093df3e1789eeccbe42730dca); PR is behind or has merge conflicts and needs a cloud rebase repair before automerge
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates OpenRouter dynamic model capability parsing to prefer `top_provider.context_length`, bumps the disk cache version, adds regression tests, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's parser uses the top-level OpenRouter `context_length`, and a live catalog lookup for the reported model shows that value is larger than the endpoint-specific `top_provider.context_length`; I did not run full authenticated inference.
commands.review_followup: The code review is clean, but the automerge path needs the current-main `CHANGELOG.md` conflict resolved before the exact head can merge.

target.title: fix(openrouter): use endpoint context limits
target.body:
Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/85949 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.
